selected.reason: Displays a clear UI with key AI models and Chinese text highlighting a core theme (using top models with high cost), serving as a visual anchor for course topic.
Presents a symbolic diagram comparing AI to a Ph.D. graduate, with clear text and visual metaphor, useful for illustrating the teaching concept of AI intelligence levels.
Shows a structured visual list (with labels) of production equipment (camera, microphone, LED light, etc.), providing a clear teaching artifact for discussing team production setup.

dropped_summary: frame_0003.jpg was dropped as it shows only the lecturer speaking without any distinct visual teaching artifact. Frame 00:00 (frame_0001) and 00:00 (frame_0002) were kept for their clear UI and diagram content. Other frames are either lecturer-only, lack distinct visuals, or are duplicates of earlier content.
